query:
UPDATE backlinks SET sourceUrl = 
  CASE 
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%facebook%' THEN 'https://www.facebook.com/nimbusroofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%bbb%' THEN 'https://www.bbb.org/us/tx/mckinney'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%linkedin%' THEN 'https://www.linkedin.com/company/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%yelp%' THEN 'https://www.yelp.com/biz/nimbus-roofing-mckinney'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%mapquest%' THEN 'https://www.mapquest.com/us/texas/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%owens%' THEN 'https://www.owenscorning.com/en-us/roofing/contractors/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%dun%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%dnb%' THEN 'https://www.dnb.com/business-directory/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%homefex%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%buildzoom%' THEN 'https://www.buildzoom.com/contractor/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%google%' THEN 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%angi%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%angieslist%' THEN 'https://www.angi.com/companylist/nimbus-roofing'
    ELSE sourceUrl
  END
WHERE sourceUrl IS NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Vqx4SDKYST7k6m.root --database Da8Aqq7vdypxzx6Gdf6sLN --execute UPDATE backlinks SET sourceUrl = 
  CASE 
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%facebook%' THEN 'https://www.facebook.com/nimbusroofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%bbb%' THEN 'https://www.bbb.org/us/tx/mckinney'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%linkedin%' THEN 'https://www.linkedin.com/company/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%yelp%' THEN 'https://www.yelp.com/biz/nimbus-roofing-mckinney'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%mapquest%' THEN 'https://www.mapquest.com/us/texas/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%owens%' THEN 'https://www.owenscorning.com/en-us/roofing/contractors/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%dun%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%dnb%' THEN 'https://www.dnb.com/business-directory/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%homefex%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%buildzoom%' THEN 'https://www.buildzoom.com/contractor/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%google%' THEN 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/nimbus-roofing'
    WHEN sourceUrl LIKE '%angi%' OR sourceUrl LIKE '%angieslist%' THEN 'https://www.angi.com/companylist/nimbus-roofing'
    ELSE sourceUrl
  END
WHERE sourceUrl IS NOT NULL;
